eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Martin, MN; at 2:19 PM on MAR 14, 2019 Effective until 3:04 PM MAR 15, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Due to snow and rainfall amounts, road conditions are very dangerous. Visibility of dangerous and flooded roads will deteriorate as night arrives. Please use extreme caution when driving on gravel or township roads in Martin County for the next few days.
